title: Review: 6-commit wallet arc
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — arc is stable, new territory (scanner, wallet init/restore, balance/receive, public API) all came back clean. One P3 fragility in scanner error handling. Running out of real complaints.
Confidence: 8% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: no end-to-end integration test for scanner against live/mock lightwalletd; payment state machine under concurrent load not exercised. Would raise confidence if: scanner exercised against testnet lightwalletd. Review is converging — this round found one P3 in ~1700 lines of new code examined.
close_reason: Review converged: P0=0, P1=0, P2=0, running out of real complaints
